name: Nanao Yozakura
description:
Nanao Yozakura is the fourth son and the youngest sibling of the 10th generation
__________________________________________________________________________________________________

Human

When he's not mutated, Nanao is much smaller in stature with short cut turquoise colored hair with a few spikes of hair at the front. The sclera of one of his eyes is a different color with his right eye being black instead and his left eye being normal. His iris' and pupils are both colored turquoise. In this form is also prone to swelling in various areas of his body, which leads to this form being harder to maintain. He typically stays in this form to go to school and wear his school uniform, it also allows him to wear normal clothing like t-shirts and shorts which he often wears.

After the time-skip, Nanao now had very long hair and wore no clothes.

Mutated

When mutated, Nanao grows to have a larger and more muscular body. In this form he is able to modify and change the size of his body parts through the mutation, allowing him to become stronger too. His skin also become slightly more tanned than normal. When in this form he wears a blue bucket over his head with a crudely drawn smile on it. He also wears a lab coat over a blue t-shirt, his hands are also covered by blue rubber gloves.

After the time-skip, Nanao's bucket now has an "X" over the left eye. He no longer wears a lab coat and instead has a dress shirt and vest with a tie that has the number 7 on it. He continues to wear his rubber gloves.
